creator: mteterin@mlp.com
text:
LyX 1.5 requires Qt4. For this reason it will not be the default LyX 
(print/lyx) until KDE switches to Qt4 as well.

Trash, can I commit this patch against your port (print/lyx15)? Thanks!

 -mi
